definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Who is that person?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as an interrogative pronoun to ask about a person.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as an interrogative pronoun to ask about a person.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The man who called me is here.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The man who called me is here.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a person.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a person.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: What is your name?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as an interrogative word to ask for information (open choice).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as an interrogative word to ask for information (open choice).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I don't know what to do.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I don't know what to do.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as a relative pronoun to refer to 'the thing(s) that'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as a relative pronoun to refer to 'the thing(s) that'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Which color do you prefer?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as an interrogative word to ask about a limited choice.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as an interrogative word to ask about a limited choice.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The car which is red is mine.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The car which is red is mine.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a thing.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a thing.]
